_comment: ThermoFooty local-path overrides — copy this file to `local_paths.json`
(gitignored) and fill in the absolute paths your machine actually uses.
The real `local_paths.json` is gitignored so no machine-specific path
ever lands in a public repo.
Only `data_root` is required; everything under it follows the layout
data_root: <absolute path to your ThermoFooty data root, e.g. /mnt/external/ThermoFooty>
